paragraphs.title: Initial (x+A)^y
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j

UNWIND range(1,1) AS const
WITH toString(const) AS constant, '1' as dimension
MERGE (i:IndexedByXY {Dimension:dimension,Constant:constant})
CREATE (v1:VertexNode {Scalar:constant,Degree:'1'})
CREATE (v2:VertexNode {Scalar:constant,Degree:'0'})
MERGE (i) - [:VertexIndexedBy] -> (v1)
MERGE (i) - [:VertexIndexedBy] -> (v2)

MERGE (ii:IndexedByArgumentXY {Dimension:dimension,Constant:constant})
CREATE (v3:VertexNode {Scalar:constant,Degree:'1'})
CREATE (v4:VertexNode {Scalar:constant,Degree:'0'})
MERGE (ii) - [:VertexIndexedBy] -> (v3)
MERGE (ii) - [:VertexIndexedBy] -> (v4)

paragraphs.title: S12 Equivalent (Reduced Scalars)
paragraphs.text:
UNWIND range(1,1) AS const
WITH toString(const) AS constant, '1' as dimension
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedByXY {Dimension:dimension,Constant:constant})   
WITH constant,dimension,v,i                        
MATCH (vv:VertexNode)<-[vII:VertexIndexedBy]-(ii:IndexedByArgumentXY {Dimension:dimension,Constant:constant} ) 
WITH dimension,constant,v.Scalar AS TScalar,v.Degree AS TDegree,vv.Scalar AS AScalar,vv.Degree AS ADegree
WITH   apoc.number.exact.add(TDegree,ADegree) AS degreeSum,apoc.number.exact.mul(TScalar,AScalar) AS scalarProduct            
WITH {Scalar:Collect(scalarProduct),Degree:degreeSum} as termMap
WITH COLLECT(termMap) as termMapC
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(termMapC)-1) as i
WITH termMapC[i].Scalar as tMCs,termMapC[i].Degree as dMCd
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x in tMCs | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) as acc, dMCd
MERGE (i:IndexedByXY {Dimension:'2',Constant:'1'})
CREATE (i) - [:VertexIndexedBy] ->   (v:VertexNode {Scalar:acc,Degree:dMCd})

paragraphs.title: S12 Equivelant  (Simple)
paragraphs.text:
UNWIND range(1,1) AS const
WITH toString(const) AS constant, '1' as dimension
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedByXY {Dimension:dimension,Constant:constant})   
WITH constant,dimension,v,i                        
MATCH (vv:VertexNode)<-[vII:VertexIndexedBy]-(ii:IndexedByArgumentXY {Dimension:dimension,Constant:constant} ) 

WITH dimension,constant,v.Scalar AS TScalar,v.Degree AS TDegree,vv.Scalar AS AScalar,vv.Degree AS ADegree
WITH   apoc.number.exact.add(TDegree,ADegree) AS degreeSum,apoc.number.exact.mul(TScalar,AScalar) AS scalarProduct                                      
MERGE (i:IndexedByXY {Dimension:'2',Constant:'1'})
CREATE (i) - [:VertexIndexedBy] ->   (v:VertexNode {Scalar:scalarProduct,Degree:degreeSum})

Match (i:IndexedByXY )-[]->(v)
DETACH DELETE i,v
RETURN COUNT(v)
